mapper.select:
SELECT A.NTCN_NO , A.NTCN_SJ , A.NTCN_CN , A.NTCN_TM , A.BH_NTCN_INTRVL , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM TB_NTFC_INFO A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NTFC_INFO A WHERE 1=1

SELECT A.NTCN_NO , A.NTCN_SJ , A.NTCN_CN , A.NTCN_TM , A.BH_NTCN_INTRVL , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM TB_NTFC_INFO A WHERE A.NTCN_NO = #{ntfcNo}
SELECT A.NTCN_NO , A.NTCN_SJ , A.NTCN_CN , A.NTCN_TM , A.BH_NTCN_INTRVL , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM TB_NTFC_INFO A
